news.summary: A ceremony was held in Tysons, Virginia on May 16, 2025, to recognize individuals who have devoted themselves to making a positive impact. The PenFed Foundation, a nationwide nonprofit aiding veterans in their shift from military to civilian life, revealed details during the event. The organization focuses on supporting veterans as they strive for success after serving their country.
news.headline: PenFed Foundation event raises $1.2 million for veterans. Nonprofit empowers veterans in transition.

news.summary: Primary election candidates who are participating will convene at AZPM in Tucson on June 9 and June 10. The event will be organized by Clean Elections, the sole nonpartisan voter education entity in the state. The debates will focus on the candidates running for Congressional District 7 in the lead-up to the special elections. The announcement was made on May 16, 2025, by PRNewswire based in Phoenix.
news.headline: Clean Elections to host Congressional District 7 candidate debates in Tucson on June 9 and 10. Important for voter education.

news.summary: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier Inc. (NYSE: RYN) declared a second quarter cash dividend of $0.2725 per common share. The dividend will be paid on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 16, 2025. Additionally, the board of directors of Rayonier, L.P. announced a second quarter cash distribution of $0.2725 per operating share.
news.headline: Rayonier (NYSE:RYN) declares Q2 dividend of $0.2725 per share, payable on June 30, 2025, to shareholders on record by June 16.

news.summary: The altcoin market, excluding Ether (ETH), witnessed a significant surge in Q2, adding $126 billion to its total market cap, sparking speculation of an impending altseason among analysts. Analyst Javon Marks pointed out similarities between the current breakout and the 2017 bull run, suggesting a potential rally. Another analyst, Moustache, highlighted a bullish pattern in the TOTAL3 chart, indicating a potential rally and forecasting higher levels for altcoins. However, mixed sentiments exist among analysts regarding the altcoin rally, with some cautioning that the market has not yet seen a higher time frame bullish trend shift. Altcoin spot trading volumes remain under $10 billion, signaling early stages of a rally, but viewed as a precursor to significant growth. The Altcoin Season Index, at 24, indicates Bitcoin dominance but also sets a positive stage for potential altcoin pumps in the future. Overall, investors show optimism for an altcoin rally, with signs pointing towards a potential market shift.
news.headline: Altcoins may see a massive rally soon, as Q2 gains $126B. Analysts target a repeat of 2017's breakout. Altcoin spot volumes below $10B indicate early rally stages. Market outlook positive for altcoin season. Risk always involved in investments.
US bank deposits rose to $18.149 tln from $18.105 tln in the prior week

news.summary: The recently unveiled luxury community showcases striking architectural and interior design.
news.headline: Toll Brothers opens new luxury community in Nashville; Grand Opening of Toll Brothers at The Nations Model.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (NYSE: RHP), a prominent real estate investment trust specializing in upscale convention center resorts and country music entertainment experiences, announced its participation in the 2025 REITweek Conference in New York, NY. The presentation is scheduled for Wednesday, June 4, at 11:45 a.m. ET. Mark Fioravanti, the President and CEO, will engage in an analyst-led roundtable discussion. Additionally, Jennifer Hutcheson, the CFO, and Sarah Martin, the VP of Investor Relations, will also be present at the event.
news.headline: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (RHP) to present at 2025 REITweek Conference on June 4 at 11:45 a.m. ET in NYC with CEO and CFO attending.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Silo Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: SILO), a biopharmaceutical company in Sarasota, Florida, specializing in innovative therapeutics and drug delivery systems, completed a public offering. The offering included 3,333,338 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants), along with Series A-1 warrants to buy up to 3,333,338 shares and Series A-2 warrants to buy up to 3,333,338 shares. The public offering price was $0.60 per share (or pre-funded warrant), along with the associated Series A-1 and A-2 warrants. The Series A-1 warrants have a $0.60 exercise price, can be exercised upon issuance, and expire in five years. The Series A-2 warrants also have a $0.60 exercise price, are exercisable upon issuance, and expire in eighteen months.
news.headline: Silo Pharma closed a $2 million public offering of 3,333,338 shares at $0.60/share, including warrants to purchase shares.

news.summary: UMH Properties, Inc. (NYSE: UMH) (TASE: UMH) recently disclosed the successful incorporation of ten communities comprising 2,001 sites into its Fannie Mae credit facility via Wells Fargo Bank, N.A, yielding around $101.4 million. Secured at a fixed rate of 5.855% with a 10-year term, the interest-only loan will support the company's strategic endeavors, including new acquisitions, expansions, rental property investments, and the refinancing of higher-interest debt in the interim period.
news.headline: UMH Properties, Inc. adds 10 communities with 2,001 sites worth $101.4 million to Fannie Mae credit facility for investments.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Azimut Exploration Inc. finalized a non-brokered placement with Centerra Gold Inc., as per the press release dated April 28, 2025. The Company issued 9,935,000 common shares to Centerra, raising $5,961,000 in gross proceeds. Azimut's stock symbols are TSXV: AZM and OTCQX: AZMTF, while Centerra's are TSX: CG and NYSE: CGAU. This transaction marks a significant investment for Azimut and highlights the confidence Centerra has in the company's potential growth.
news.headline: Azimut closes $8.7M private placement with Centerra Gold, issuing 9,935,000 shares for gross proceeds of $5,961,000.

news.summary: Savers Value Village, Inc. disclosed the completion of a secondary offering of 15,000,000 shares of common stock. The Company, listed as NYSE: SVV and renowned as the largest for-profit thrift operator in the U.S. and Canada for affordable pre-owned clothing, accessories, and household items, confirmed the conclusion of this transaction. The shares were priced at $0.000001 per share and were offered by specific entities related to Ares Management Private Equity and Opportunistic.
news.headline: Savers Value Village, Inc. closes secondary public offering of 15,000,000 shares of common stock (NYSE: SVV).

news.summary: Evolus, Inc. announced the issuance of stock options in May, granting 12,706 shares and 40,576 restricted stock units to 16 newly hired non-executive employees. The stock options were non-qualified and pertain to the company's common stock. This decision was made by the compensation committee for the employees of Evolus, a performance beauty company listed as EOLS on NASDAQ, as they focus on expanding their consumer brands in the aesthetic sector.
news.headline: Evolus granted 12,706 stock options and 40,576 RSUs to 16 new non-executive employees under Nasdaq rule.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GROV) recently announced that on May 15, 2025, they were informed by the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) of non-compliance with Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This section mandates a minimum average global market capitalization of $50 million over a 30-day trading period and stockholders’ equity of at least $50 million. The company received a written notice regarding this non-compliance.
news.headline: Grove Collaborative Holdings receives NYSE non-compliance notice for average global market cap below $50 million.

news.summary: Despite the recovery seen in Wall Street since April, small-cap stocks are struggling, with the Russell 2000 index trading close to its lowest level compared to the S&P 500 since December 2000. The ratio between iShares Russell 2000 ETF (NYSE: IWM) and SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) has remained stagnant, nearing levels last observed 24 years ago. This emphasizes investors' inclination towards larger, multinational corporations amidst continued macroeconomic uncertainties. Small-cap companies have continuously lagged behind their large-cap counterparts in 2025, with analyst Michael Gayed, CFA, attributing this to the potential vulnerability of these firms to tariffs. This disparity between small and large caps is the largest seen in a quarter-century. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Russell 2000 at 24-year low vs. S&P 500, small caps struggle with ratio near lowest level since 2000, signaling investor preference for large firms.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 16, 2025, DMG Blockchain Solutions Inc., listed on the TSX-V as DMGI, on OTCQB as DMGGF, and on FRANKFURT as 6AX, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025, concluding on March 31. The report is scheduled for release on May 21, 2025, after the markets close. DMG operates as a comprehensive blockchain and data center technology firm.
news.headline: DMG Blockchain Solutions Inc. to release second quarter 2025 earnings on May 21, 2025; March 31 end date.

news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C. today, Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (NASDAQ: COKE) disclosed the approval of a 10-for-1 split of its Common Stock and Class B Common Stock by its stockholders. The split-adjusted trading of the company's stock is anticipated to commence around May 27, 2025. On May 23, 2025, shareholders will receive nine extra shares for each share of Common Stock or Class B Common Stock in possession.
news.headline: Coca-Cola Consolidated's 10-for-1 stock split approved, shares to trade on split basis from May 27, 2025; 9 additional shares per each held on May 23, 2025.

news.summary: Carlisle Companies Incorporated shared the addition of Christopher B. Gaskill as the new Vice President & General Counsel, as well as Scott C. Selbach transitioning to Executive Vice President, Government Relations. Mr. Gaskill will report to Chris Koch, Carlisle's Chair, President & Chief Executive Officer. Scott C. Selbach will concurrently hold the position of Secretary of the Company. Carlisle Companies trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CSL.
news.headline: Carlisle Companies appoints Christopher B. Gaskill as VP & General Counsel; Scott C. Selbach becomes Executive VP, Government Relations.

news.summary: The trade war between the U.S. and China is easing as both countries have agreed to reduce tariffs by 115 percentage points. This cuts U.S. duties on Chinese goods to 30%. The news led to a surge in the stock market, with the S&P 500 reaching levels not seen since early March 2025, and recovering from losses incurred due to President Trump's tariff announcement on "Liberation Day." Economists are now more optimistic about the trade situation, lowering the chances of a recession and upgrading growth forecasts for the latter half of the year. The S&P 500 had five consecutive winning sessions, with the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) closing 5% higher for the week. The iShares Semiconductor ETF (NYSE: SOXX) saw a 10% increase, marking its fourth straight week of gains and its best monthly rally since 2020. Clean energy stocks, specifically tracked by the Invesco Solar ETF (NYSE: TAN), outperformed chipmakers, as solar companies experienced a surge following the release of a tax proposal by Republicans. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US-China trade truce cuts tariffs by 115 points, sparking Wall Street rally. S&P 500 rises, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust closes 5% higher for the week. Semiconductor ETF soars nearly 10%, clean energy stocks shine with surge after tax proposal release.

news.summary: In Rochester, New York, Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX), a prominent human capital management company, revealed that its Founder, B. Thomas Golisano, will be resigning from his position as a member of the Paychex Board of Directors following the Board's July 2025 meeting. Golisano, aged 83, founded Paychex in 1971 with the goal of offering payroll assistance to small businesses. The company was taken public in 1983, with Golisano holding roles as President and Chief Executive Officer.
news.headline: B. Thomas Golisano, Paychex Founder, stepping down from Board of Directors at 83; founded Paychex in 1971.

news.summary: The cannabis industry saw a mix of developments this week. Some highlights include global advancements like Canada's GrowerIQ expansion to Thailand and Curaleaf's medical vaporizer receiving EU clearance, alongside outdated DEA enforcement tactics in the U.S. Sales increased but job losses occurred. California raised taxes, DoorDash started delivering hemp drinks, while illegal shops may reopen in New York. In contrast, an Indonesian basketball player faces death over cannabis candy. Earnings-wise, Organigram reported a 74% revenue increase to $45.7 million in Q2, with Adjusted EBITDA of CA$4.9 million. Planet 13's revenue grew to $28 million in Q1, but they swung to an EBITDA loss. Village Farms repositioned with a $40 million deal. Glass House beat expectations with revenue of $44.8 million in Q1. LEEF Brands and iAnthus announced strategic deals, while Ascend stayed cash-flow positive with $128 million in Q1 revenue. Hydrofarm, however, saw a 25% drop in Q1 net sales.
news.headline: Highlights: Organigram revenue up 74% to $45.7M, adjusted EBITDA $4.9M; Planet 13 revenue $28M, EBITDA loss; Village Farms net loss $6.7M, $3M income from cannabis; Glass House revenue up 49% to $44.8M, adjusted EBITDA $4.4M; iAnthus Q1 revenue $38.1M, net income $5.1M; Ascend Q1 revenue $128M, operating cash flow $5.9M; Hydrofarm Q1 net sales $40.5M, down 25%. Meme war, tax hike, and legal issues make headlines.

news.summary: The platform is utilizing its cryptocurrency service as a strategy to grow its customer numbers and back the advancement of the technology.
news.headline: Kraken is expanding user base by leveraging crypto-as-a-service, a global race for crypto users #BunqBet #technology adoption.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Annexon, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as ANNX, revealed that it provided inducement grants to two new non-executive staff members as part of the 2022 Employment Inducement Award Plan. The equity awards, approved on May 14, 2025, align with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Annexon focuses on developing advanced therapies for individuals afflicted by severe classical complement-mediated neuroinflammatory illnesses affecting the body, brain, and eye.
news.headline: Annexon, Inc. gave inducement grants to 2 new non-executive employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In El Dorado Hills, California, on May 16, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), revealed that their luxury home model is up for sale at Hidden Ridge, an elite gated community. The renowned builder highlighted that there are only a limited number of homes left for purchase in this Sacramento-area neighborhood, with the impressive Sierra Modern Farmhouse model home being one of them.
news.headline: Toll Brothers selling model home at Hidden Ridge in El Dorado Hills, CA, few homes left in community.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in San Francisco, efforts to eliminate menthol cigarettes from the U.S. market are ongoing. The African American Tobacco Control Leadership Council (AATCLC) and the faith community are joining forces on May 18 to increase awareness of this issue. The movement has gained momentum nationwide and aims to ban menthol cigarettes in order to protect public health. Stay tuned for updates on this initiative.
news.headline: National campaign to abolish menthol cigarettes gains momentum as faith leaders organize No Menthol Sunday on May 18, 2025.

news.summary: Toronto, on May 16, 2025, Waste Connections, Inc. revealed the outcomes of its Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting, which featured eight director nominees as outlined in the Company's 2025 management information circular, saw participation from investors holding shares of WCN on TSX and NYSE.
news.headline: Waste Connections reports results of Annual Shareholders Meeting, all eight director nominees approved.

news.summary: A recent report by Info-Tech Research Group, a leading global research and advisory firm, highlights six key research priorities that are empowering IT leaders in the financial and professional services sectors. These priorities are essential for spearheading digital transformation, managing the impact of artificial intelligence disruptions, improving compliance measures, and generating tangible value in their operations. This valuable insight equips industry professionals with the necessary tools to navigate the evolving technology landscape and stay ahead in a rapidly changing digital economy.
news.headline: Info-Tech report outlines 6 IT strategies for finance & professional services in 2025. Leaders to focus on digital transformation, AI, compliance for value.

news.summary: Today, MasterBeef Group, a restaurant group in Hong Kong known for Taiwanese hotpot and barbecue, shared that they have issued 155,000 ordinary shares at a price of US$4.00 per share. This issuance totaled approximately $620,000 before deductions, as part of the underwriter's over-allotment option exercise related to their recent initial public offering. The option closed on May 16, 2025. Since April 10, 2025, their ordinary shares have been trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol “MB.”
news.headline: MasterBeef Group closed partial exercise of over-allotment option, issuing 155,000 Ordinary Shares at $4.00 each for $620,000. Nasdaq symbol "MB."

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Heidmar Maritime Holdings Corp. unveiled the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on May 15, 2025. This report features the audited financial statements for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, by the Company identified as Heidmar. This maritime corporation is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HMR.
news.headline: Heidmar's 2024 report on Form 20-F with audited financials up to Dec 2014 available; filed with SEC on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: On May 13, 2025, 4D Molecular Therapeutics awarded 31,800 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to eight non-executive employees as part of the Company’s 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan. This move was approved by the Company’s board of directors in February 2025 under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market. The goal of this initiative is to attract new talent to the biotechnology organization, which specializes in developing advanced disease-targeted therapeutics. With this step, 4D Molecular Therapeutics aims to enhance treatment options and improve outcomes for patients.
news.headline: 4DMT granted 31,800 RSUs to 8 new non-executive employees on May 13, 2025, under its 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Titan Machinery Inc. (Nasdaq: TITN), a renowned network of full-service agricultural and construction equipment stores based in WEST FARGO, N.D., successfully finalized the acquisition of the dealership assets of Farmers Implement & Irrigation. This acquisition includes the takeover of a two-store New Holland dealership situated in Brookings and Watertown, South Dakota. In the entire year of 2024, Farmers Implement & Irrigation amassed revenue amounting to approximately $20 million.
news.headline: Titan Machinery acquires Farmers Implement & Irrigation, a 2-store New Holland dealership in SD for $20 million.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Covenant Logistics Group, Inc. (NYSE: CVLG) based in Chattanooga, Tennessee, revealed its decision to distribute a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share for both Class A and Class B common stock. Stockholders as of June 6, 2025, are eligible for this dividend, which is scheduled to be disbursed on June 27, 2025.
news.headline: Covenant Logistics Group declares a $0.07 quarterly cash dividend for Class A and B stock, payable on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: In Middletown, N.Y. on May 16, 2025, Orange County Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBT), the parent company of Orange Bank & Trust Company and Hudson Valley Investment Advisors, Inc., has stated a cash dividend of $0.13 per share for its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on June 16, 2025, to shareholders recorded on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Orange County Bancorp, Inc. declares a $0.13 cash dividend per share of its common stock, payable on June 16, 2025. Record date: June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Lexington, Kentucky, Kentucky American Water has submitted a proposal to the Kentucky Public Service Commission for revised rates, citing over $212 million in recent system enhancements. This initiative underscores the company's dedication to upgrading outdated infrastructure and upholding high standards for delivering safe, dependable, and cost-effective services in accordance with environmental mandates. The focus remains on ensuring customer satisfaction and well-being through these efforts.
news.headline: Kentucky American Water seeks rate increase due to over $212M in investments for infrastructure upgrades.

Scheduled for May 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, Kave Niksefat, the senior vice president of Global Marketing and Access at Amgen, will be the presenter in the event.

news.summary: In South San Francisco on May 16, 2025, Cytokinetics, Incorporated disclosed granting stock options totaling 40,275 shares of common stock and 27,144 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 5 new employees. These inducements were given to employees who began their employment in April and May 2025. The RSUs will be settled in common stock upon vesting. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CYTK.
news.headline: Cytokinetics grants stock options to 5 new employees totaling 40,275 shares and 27,144 RSUs under Nasdaq rule.

news.summary: On May 13, 2025, Nurix Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under NRIX, disclosed that it provided a total of thirteen new employees with inducement awards. These awards were issued under Nurix's 2024 Equity Inducement Plan to incentivize the employees to join the company. The approval for these grants was obtained from the Compensation Committee of Nurix’s Board of Directors, following the guidelines established by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Nurix is currently focusing on developing targeted protein degradation drugs for cancer and inflammatory diseases, with a commitment to enhancing treatment options for patients in these areas.
news.headline: Nurix Therapeutics reports granting awards to 13 new employees on May 13, 2025, under Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: In Ypsilanti, Michigan on May 16, 2025, Eastern Michigan University unveiled Way Forward@EMU, a groundbreaking program aimed at transforming health education for youth. The initiative has received a generous grant of $1,016,850 from the Toyota Way Forward Fund. This innovative project is tailored to equip high school students with essential leadership skills and knowledge in the health sector.
news.headline: Eastern Michigan University launches youth health leaders program with $1M Toyota grant. #EmpoweringYouth #HealthEducation

news.summary: On Friday, Roblox's stock reached a new high for multiple years, extending its winning trend after a recent breakout. The positive momentum was further boosted by support from Rihanna.
news.headline: Roblox stock reaches multiyear high with help from Rihanna, continuing winning streak.

news.summary: NetScout Systems recently received a Relative Strength Rating boost due to its improving technical performance. Investors are wondering if this positive trend will persist. The upgrade signifies an advancement in the company's stock metrics, hinting at potential future growth opportunities. This information was featured in an article on Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: NetScout Systems receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade indicating improved technical performance. Will the trend persist?
